name: Camp Hash
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Shredded Dried Hash Brown Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in the bottom of the pan, breaking it up as it cooks until all pink (raw) meat is cooked through.
2. Add water and soup mix, stirring to combine.
3. Heat to boiling and simmer for a few minutes.
4. Add the dry potatoes and stir to mix.
5. Cover the pot and move it to the edge of the fire for about 10 minutes to allow the potatoes to swell with the water.
6. Move the pot back on the heat and stir while cooking the potatoes, which should take about 5-10 minutes.
7. Serve hot. Seasonings may be added with the potatoes during cooking for desired taste (e.g., hot peppers, chili powder, basil, Italian seasonings).
8. The meat can be any type, such as hamburger or sausage, and different meats provide varying flavors. This hash can serve as either a meal for dinner or breakfast.
